description: A customer with a wool allergy calls to ask if a specific sweater contains any wool.

nodes.task_description: Get the product name or item number from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The agent identifies the specific sweater in question.

nodes.task_description: Look up the product in the product information management (PIM) system.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the detailed product page.

nodes.task_description: Check the material composition field and inform the customer that the sweater is made of '80% Cotton, 20% Polyester' and contains no wool.

expected_outcome.value: The agent provides accurate information that helps the customer make a safe purchasing decision.
